name: Oven Easy Turkey & Potato Dinner
recipeIngredient: 1 lb turkey light meat, skinless, cooked and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a 2-quart casserole dish, press hash brown potatoes evenly across the bottom to form a shell. Set aside.
3. Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
4. Add turkey, onions, and bell peppers to the skillet. Cook until the turkey is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
5. Stir in water, gravy mix, and salt. Bring to a boil.
6. Add mixed vegetables and reduce heat. Cook for 5 minutes, uncovered.
7. Remove from heat. Stir in half of the grated cheddar cheese.
8. Spoon the mixture into the hash brown potato shell.
9. Bake, uncovered, for 15 minutes or until heated through.
10. Top with remaining cheddar cheese.
11. Bake, uncovered again, for 5 more minutes.
